results.title: Human or Not? Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.7

Based on 6 reviews

Review Human or Not??

"Human or Not?" is a captivating social Turing game that challenges players to distinguish between human and AI interactions. Users appreciate its engaging concept and simple, clean interface, which makes it accessible without needing instructions. While some players note occasional issues, such as inappropriate language from AI or access problems, the overall experience is positive. Many find the game thought-provoking, especially in an era where AI is increasingly influential. The game successfully entertains and intrigues users, encouraging them to explore the nuances of human and AI communication.

+3

results.title: WeWeb.io: The best AI app builder for non-coders with big ideas | Product Hunt
results.content:
Softr is faster for simple portals and directories, but not flexible enough for serious custom app logic.

Retool is stronger for internal admin tools, but less suitable for polished client-facing products.

Webflow is better for marketing sites, but not for complex app logic and backend-driven workflows.

Framer is great for landing pages and visual websites, but not for operational systems or real business apps.

Lovable / Bolt / Replit-style AI builders are impressive for quick prototypes, but still risky for maintainable production apps without technical control.

Cursor/custom development gives maximum control, but requires more time, budget, and frontend engineering effort.

Clément Le Cuillier
Analytics4Notion

Analytics4Notion

#### What's great [...] Xano 2.0
Prakash Chandran

#### What's great

We have been partnering with WeWeb for the past couple of years, and it has been great to watch them evolve into what feels like the IDE of the future. It gives you the speed and flexibility of vibe coding while still maintaining the level of control you need when working alongside AI.

What I also appreciate is how much they’ve streamlined the path from prototype to production. Their integrated backend makes it easy for teams to ship quickly, while still giving users the option to graduate into something more production-grade like Xano as their needs evolve.

It’s a genuinely unique piece of software and, in my opinion, one of the most extensible AI-native building tools on the market today. [...] #### vs Alternatives

Retool
Supabase
Webflow
Bubble
Super

Traditional “no-code” tools always force you to make compromises: either you get a lot of design freedom but no application logic (Webflow), or you get robust application logic but are completely locked into a single provider and subject to rigid pricing (Bubble). WeWeb is the first platform to offer the best of both worlds. It gives you full control over the user interface, native state management, and connects to any modern backend (Xano, Supabase) through the generation of clean Vue.js code. It’s the ideal tool for teams looking to build production-ready SaaS applications without technical debt.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

Xano 2.0
Prakash Chandran

#### What's great

results.title: Liner Write: Cursor for professional writing | Product Hunt
results.content:
Please try it out and let us know your experience!

Michael Vavilov

Does it work for copywriting? Blog-post, for example?

Jinu Kim
Liner

Liner

@michael\_vavilov Liner Write strives in logical writing. So you can use Liner Write for blog-post, newsletters, sales proposal, resume, developer docs, and so on.

Copywriting will be more of a creative work. We'll try to cover that later but for now, it's very powerful in logical writing!

Sayem Faruk

Cool product, Jinu.  
  
Curious: Does it work cross-device?   
  
I use different devices (phone, laptop, tablet), so it would be cool if my context followed where I went.

Jinu Kim
Liner

results.title: retrieve.tools: AI tool database for professionals. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Hamza Afzal Butt

@adi\_kurian Congratulations team :) This is like Google Maps but for AI tools, I didn’t even know I needed that until now 😅. Love that I can filter by task (not just hype). umm, any plans to crowdsource quality ratings or tag “overhyped” tools for fun?

Piotr Kusiak
DocsHound

DocsHound

@adi\_kurian  @hamza\_afzal\_butt Thanks for the feedback. We are planning a few community features in the near future - stay tuned!

Pranay Bansal

THIS is why I come to PH. AI to find AI. Love the idea guys, congratulations on the launch! The prioritization of professional context over hype is very nice. Will there be user reviews, quality scores, pricing, etc? Especially pricing is something I would love to see so that I only open websites of products that are free (I like free). [...] Vinayak Joshi
My Notes on Medium

My Notes on Medium

DocsHound

DocsHound

@vinayak\_joshi1 should be resolved soon

Sonal Thomas

Amazing idea beautifully designed. Is it possible to submit tools just like tools directories?

Adi Kurian
DocsHound

DocsHound

@sonal\_thomas hey! yes it is. you use an extension and click through your app. automatically ui screenshots can go on (soon to be launched) product pages, and helps our ai automatically tag / classify. no need to fill out a form or submit anything by hand.

Suryansh Tiwari
EverTutor AI

EverTutor AI

damn crazy product this is called an amazing launch great work team @joe\_dewulf

Vic Hu
Brev

Brev

Thanks for building this. Do you offer API access or MCP? [...] retrieve.tools/sales/follow-up-automation,leads-optimization,prospect-research

Or perhaps, you are a creative director that is looking to create 3d worlds and generate b-roll for ad spots.

retrieve.tools/creative/3d,video-generation

You get the point :)

We also thought it would be quite odd to have a tools site that is not AI native. As such, the entry point is AI search where you can query with language, each query leading to results page with a permanent link that is shareable.

17 industry domains with granular sub-classifications

Natural language search for discovery

Precise filters for refinement

Permanent, shareable URLs that preserve your exact search path

Hamza Afzal Butt
